entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA

entities.description: Crop species Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench

entities.description: Region where sorghum production is limited by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: Interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors affecting trait expression

entities.description: Ability of sorghum to resist infestation by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: Measure of the amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: STRIGA INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of being infested by the parasitic weed Striga hermonthica

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country in Africa where sorghum trials were conducted

entities.description: Country in Africa where sorghum trials were conducted

entities.name: ASVPC
entities.description: Area under striga severity progress curve, used to measure striga emergence and vigor

entities.name: PATTERN ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analytical approach using classification and ordination to study G x E interaction

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION AND ORDINATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Specific statistical methods used within pattern analysis

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT-STANDARDIZED MATRIX
entities.description: A matrix of entry x environment means used for pattern analysis

entities.name: PERFORMANCE PLOTS

entities.description: Visual tool used to analyze entry x country interaction for ASVPC

entities.name: FRAMIDA

entities.name: SEREDO

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ability of a plant to function normally despite the presence of a stressor like Striga

entities.description: Environmental weather-related factors affecting plant reactions

entities.description: The capacity of Striga hermonthica to cause disease or damage to the host
